questions.title: Recursion Factorial
questions.description: This function is supposed to calculate the factorial of n, but it's missing a base case. Fix the code.

questions.title: Array Index Error
questions.description: This program tries to print array elements but has an indexing error in the loop. Fix it.

questions.title: Find the Errors
questions.description: There are multiple errors here: assignment in 'if', out-of-bounds access, uninitialized variable, and missing semicolon. Fix them all.

questions.title: Recursive Sum
questions.description: This recursive function to calculate sum up to n will result in infinite recursion. Fix the call syntax.

questions.title: Multiplication Table
questions.description: The logic inside the printf is wrong. It should print the multiplication table of n. Fix it.

questions.title: Reverse Number
questions.description: The logic for reversing the number is incomplete. Fix the calculation of 'rev'.

questions.title: Find Maximum in Array
questions.description: The initialization of max and the loop bounds are problematic. Fix them.

questions.title: Function Without Return
questions.description: The 'add' function is not returning the correct value. Fix it.

questions.title: String Length
questions.description: The loop condition for finding string length is using a wrong numeric value. Fix it to check for the null terminator.

questions.title: Loop Fix
questions.description: The loop has a typo in the variable name and is missing an increment. Fix it.

questions.title: Swap Values
questions.description: The swap function is not correctly dereferencing pointers. Fix the pointer usage.

questions.title: Even Count in Array
questions.description: Multiple errors: loop out-of-bounds, assignment instead of comparison, and wrong logic for counting even numbers. Fix it.

questions.title: Sum of Digits
questions.description: The calculation of 'sum' is incorrect. Fix it to add the remainder to the sum.

questions.title: Check Palindrome Number
questions.description: The logic for building the reverse number is wrong, and the original value is lost. Fix it.

questions.title: Count Vowels
questions.description: The 'if' condition logic for checking multiple characters is fundamentally wrong. Fix it.

questions.title: Smallest in Array
questions.description: Initializing 'min' to 0 is wrong if the array contains positive numbers. Fix the logic.

questions.title: Check Even Function
questions.description: The function 'check' is declared to return an 'int' but doesn't return anything. Fix its return type.

questions.title: Power Function
questions.description: The logic for calculating power is using addition instead of multiplication. Fix it.

questions.title: String Reverse
questions.description: The loop is simply copying the string instead of reversing it. Fix the loop to print in reverse.

questions.title: Fibonacci Logic
questions.description: The starting values of the Fibonacci sequence are wrong. Fix them to start from 0 and 1.

questions.title: Linear Search
questions.description: The search is using assignment instead of comparison and lacks a break. Fix it.

questions.title: Copy Array
questions.description: The loop bounds are off and the logic is copying from target to source. Fix it.

questions.title: Sum Function Return
questions.description: The 'sum' function prints instead of returning, causing an issue in the main function. Fix it.

questions.title: Pointer Increment
questions.description: The pointer increment is moving the pointer instead of incrementing the value. Fix it with parentheses.

questions.title: Count Words
questions.description: The loop is missing an increment for 'i', causing an infinite loop. Fix it.

questions.title: Factorial Loop
questions.description: Factorial initialization to 0 will always result in 0. Fix it to start from 1.

questions.title: Infinite Loop Fix
questions.description: The loop is incrementing instead of decrementing, leading to an infinite loop. Fix it.

questions.title: Reverse Loop
questions.description: The loop condition and increment are wrong for a reverse loop. Fix them.

questions.title: Switch Case Break
questions.description: The switch case is missing 'break' statements, leading to fall-through. Fix it.

questions.title: Count Digits
questions.description: The loop is missing a statement to reduce 'n', causing an infinite loop. Fix it.
